text.value:
DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffCustomFields t
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

-- OptionValues path
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldsOptions o ON o.StaffCustomFieldId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldOptionValues v ON v.OptionId = o.Id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm1 ON tm1.id = v.StaffMemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd1 ON tm1.accountInfoId = atd1.AccountId

-- FieldValues path
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldValues fv ON fv.StaffCustomFieldEntityId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm2 ON tm2.id = fv.StaffMemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd2 ON tm2.accountInfoId = atd2.AccountId
/**
WHERE
    (
        atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
        OR atd1.AccountId IS NOT NULL
        OR atd2.AccountId IS NOT NULL
    )
    AND (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldsOptions t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFields cf ON t.StaffCustomFieldId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cf.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

-- OptionValue path
INNER JOIN dbo.hcStaffCustomFieldOptionValues v ON v.OptionId = t.Id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = v.StaffMemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd2 ON tm.accountInfoId = atd2.AccountId
/**
WHERE
    (
        atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
        OR atd2.AccountId IS NOT NULL
    )
    AND (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
**/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffMember t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON t.tblmemberid = tm.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE t.id NOT IN (220953, 194645);  -- Exclude known bad data

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffMemberAgeGroup t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON t.tblmemberid = tm.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcStaffService t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.staffmemberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
where t.id NOT IN (8181, 9533);
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    )
    AND t.id NOT IN (8181, 9533); -- Exclude bad records
**/

FROM dbo.hcStaffServiceFunder t

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcTasks t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.Referenceid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcTransaction t
WHERE t.referenceId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ha.AppointmentId
    FROM dbo.hcAppointments ha
    INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ha.clientId = cp.id
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
)
AND t.hcTransactionTypeId != 0;

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcWorkflowHistory t
INNER JOIN dbo.hcAppointments ha ON t.referenceId = ha.AppointmentId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ha.clientId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
**/
